measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Property Tax Levy
measures.what_it_does: Re-authorizes regular property tax levies of $0.50 or less per $1,000 of assessed valuation for six consecutive years to continue emergency medical services.
measures.cost_line: Renews an EMS levy up to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES renews a local property tax levy for emergency medical services.

measures.title: Emergency Medical Care and Services
measures.what_it_does: Renews Fircrest's authority to impose regular property tax levies of up to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed valuation for emergency medical care and services for six consecutive years.
measures.cost_line: Renews an EMS levy up to $0.50 per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES renews a local property tax levy for emergency medical care and services.

measures.title: Funding Transportation Safety Improvements
measures.what_it_does: Funds street, sidewalk, route, pothole, paving, maintenance, traffic safety, and neighborhood connection improvements through utility and property tax increases for 10 years.
measures.cost_line: Adds a 1.5% utility tax and raises the regular property tax levy by $0.20 per $1,000 for 2027 collections, with subsequent levies through 2036 based on the 2027 amount.

taxes.basis: YES raises utility and property taxes for transportation safety improvements.
